prompt: Is there a correlation between difficulty rating and average grade per course?

inputData.question: Is there a correlation between difficulty rating and average grade per course?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Is there a correlation between difficulty rating and average grade per course?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Is there a correlation between difficulty rating and average grade per course?"},"startedAt":1771856157698,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user is asking about correlation between difficulty rating and average grade per course. I've confirmed the schema contains courses, grades, course_evaluations, enrollments, and course_sections tables. The query needs to aggregate exam scores (as average grade) and difficulty ratings by course, then present them together to allow correlation analysis. I'll use exam_score from grades table and difficulty_rating from course_evaluations table, joining through enrollments and course_sections.","sql":"
SELECT 
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS enrollment_count,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::NUMERIC, 2) AS avg_grade,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.difficulty_rating)::NUMERIC, 2) AS avg_difficulty_rating
FROM courses c
JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL 
  AND ce.difficulty_rating IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code
","assumptions":["Difficulty rating is measured on a numeric scale (1-5 based on sample data)","Average grade is calculated from exam_score in the grades table","Only enrollments with both exam scores and difficulty ratings are included","Correlation analysis will be performed by the user on the returned dataset"]},"endedAt":1771856212690},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL 
  AND ce.difficulty_rating IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code

ORDER BY visualization.title: Correlation between Course Difficulty Rating and Average Grade
visualization.description: Scatter plot showing the relationship between average difficulty rating and average grade per course

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS enrollment_count,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::NUMERIC, 2) AS avg_grade,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.difficulty_rating)::NUMERIC, 2) AS avg_difficulty_rating
FROM courses c
JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL 
  AND ce.difficulty_rating IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code

visualization.title: Correlation between Course Difficulty Rating and Average Grade
visualization.description: Scatter plot showing the relationship between average difficulty rating and average grade per course

result.sql:
SELECT 
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS enrollment_count,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::NUMERIC, 2) AS avg_grade,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.difficulty_rating)::NUMERIC, 2) AS avg_difficulty_rating
FROM courses c
JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL 
  AND ce.difficulty_rating IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code
